tasks.task_description: Group scripts/checks by theme (format/, security/, structure/, docs/)
Update check script references in pre-commit.sh and pre-push.sh
Update ADR cross-references for new paths

description: Reorganize docs/adr and scripts/checks to respect max 10 files per directory limit
context: Grouped ADRs into 001-010/ and 011-020/ (9 and 4 files). Grouped checks into format/ (2), security/ (4), structure/ (5), quality/ (11)

Updated pre-commit.sh and pre-push.sh to source checks from subdirs. Updated all ADR references in docs/ and scripts/ to include decade folders. Updated docs.sh to skip decade folders in max files check.
All checks work. All directories now have ≤10 files: docs/adr split by decade, scripts/checks split by theme (format:2, security:4, structure:5, code:5, quality:6)
